title: Skullduv's Keystrokes
description: A fully customizable keystroke mod with FPS, CPS, and Custom Crosshair for PVP. I hope this blows up lol!
body:
# Skullduv's Keystroke mod
Contains:
- CPS Counter
- FPS Counter
- Custom Crosshair (Draw)
- Keystrokes
- Themes
- Armor Hud

Bug Report : https://modrinth.fillout.com/skullduvskeystrokes

Allows fully customizing for all options. Report bugs / changes you want by just sending me a dm on discord - Demonicddt.

It is self developed by Skullduv. Only offical on modrinth, downloading on other websites may lead to malware.
